ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR(ISBLANK(Billing_Schedule_Key__c), ISNULL(Billing_Schedule_Key__c)), ISPICKVAL(SBQQ__Status__c, 'Activated'), OR( ISPICKVAL(SBQQ__BillingFrequency__c, 'Invoice Plan'), ISPICKVAL(SBQQ__BillingFrequency__c, 'No Software') ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Order Item cannot be activated without a Billing Schedule Key.
